title: Mexican Baked Beans
ingredients: 4 28oz cans baked beans, New England style
instructions:
Grease a 13 x 9 baking dish(I use a little larger for more room but 13 x 9 works)and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add the onions and green pepper. Stir n the brown sugar and cook until the vegetables are tender. About 10 minutes.
In the baking dish, combine the baked beans with the vegetables, chili powder, salt and oregano.
Top with about 2 cups of crushed Fritos. (add more or less as desired).
Bake for 45 minutes until hot throughout.
